title: Creeper Firework
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/owUiXPam/images/478f28c265b28d1962475f8665e5c90ee3667bd8.png)
# 🥊 Description: 
This mod allows creeper to be harmless and also bueatilfu firework!  
Creeper becomes firework-born and decides to show you what they can do!  
**FABRIC VERSION** requires **Cloth Config & Fabric Api**! 
 
# 🎇 Showcase:
Explosion visual effect is more gorgeous, since all the colors are randomly generated, and the color picking process is imitating fireworks crafting.  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/owUiXPam/images/055b9946025177814269244bd87ea0ad75870056.jpeg)  
The charged creeper will have an even more gorgeous explosion effect!  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/owUiXPam/images/c99e0f2e4c25e1283d14255734ae72002b5d0a00.jpeg)
